parse.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with valid HTML and baseUri resolves relative links
parse.expectedResult: Document returned contains one <a> element with abs:href="http://example.com/foo.html"

parse.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with null html throws IllegalArgumentException
parse(String html, Parser parser) with empty baseUri and real Parser parses body

parse.description: parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) with xmlParser preserves case-sensitive tags

parse.description: parse(File file, String charsetName) with non-existent file throws IOException
pseudocode: File file = new File("missing.html"); String charset = "UTF-8";

parse.description: parse(File file, String charsetName) with gzipped file loads content
parse.precondition: gzipped file exists at temp location with HTML content
parse.expectedResult: Document returned contains text "hello world" from gzipped file
pseudocode:
File file = createTempGzipFile("

hello world

"); String charset = null;

parse.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) with malformed URL throws MalformedURLException

parse.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) with timeout exceeded throws SocketTimeoutException
parse.precondition: start a server that sleeps longer than timeout

URL url = new URL("http://localhost:8888/slow"); int timeout = 1;
